title: Mercy Transportation - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Transportation > Mercy Transportation 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AEROANGEL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides flights to distant medical care. Requests are ideally scheduled three weeks in advance although exceptions can be made for urgent situations. Flights are determined on a case-by-case basis. 1550 Larimer Street Suite 899 Denver, CO 80202 Eligibility: -Individuals age 18 and younger who are medically fragile -Flights are also considered for young adults who have been dealing with health challenges since childhood. -Passengers must be able to climb steps to board the aircraft, be medically stable, and able to sit upright or slightly reclined for the duration of the flight. Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Email (303) 817-7355 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ANGEL FLIGHT WEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Arranges air travel through donated flights. Missions flown include non-emergency medical transport to far-off medical treatment, specialty camps, domestic violence relocation, assistance for military personnel, blood/organ/tissue donations, and disaster response. Trips also cover compassion-related reasons, including but not limited to travel to visit or provide care for a critically ill family member. The distance of travel is 101 miles minimum and 899 miles maximum. Requests must be submitted at least 7 days in advance and potential clients must have a physician's medical release to travel. Requests are accepted on a case-by-case basis and assistance is not guaranteed. 3161 Donald Douglas Loop S Santa Monica, CA 90405 Eligibility: Individuals who are medically stable and fully ambulatory with a financial, geographical, or other compelling reason for needing a donated flight Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (310) 390-2958 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CORPORATE ANGEL NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides air transportation for cancer patients, bone marrow donors or recipients, and stem cell donors or recipients on a corporate aircraft. 107 Mill Plain Road Danbury, CT 06811 Eligibility: -Financial need is not a requirement -Cancer patients must be traveling to or from a nationally recognized cancer treatment center -Must be able to walk up the steps of a private jet without assistance, and no need for oxygen, IV, or medical assistance during the flight Hours: Monday-Thursday 6am-2pm, Friday 6am-1pm Email (914) 328-1313 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MERCY MEDICAL ANGELS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gas cards, bus tickets, train tickets, and air transportation for patients and medically necessary caregivers traveling to distant medical appointments. 101 W Main Street Suite 1000 Norfolk, VA 23510 Eligibility: Income must be at or below 300% of the federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Thursday 4am-2pm Email (757) 318-9174 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
